'''鈭歳-t-y''' ('''rataya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rid|rid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rid|rid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-t-y
|-
! Lemma
| rataya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ratayithi|ratayithi]] || [[word:ratayiji|ratayiji]] || [[word:ratayishi|ratayishi]] || [[word:ratayi|ratayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratayuthuth|ratayuthuth]] || [[word:ratayujuj|ratayujuj]] || [[word:ratayushush|ratayushush]] || [[word:ratay|ratay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratayuthu|ratayuthu]] || [[word:ratayuju|ratayuju]] || [[word:ratayushu|ratayushu]] || [[word:ratayu|ratayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratayufuth|ratayufuth]] || [[word:ratayufuj|ratayufuj]] || [[word:ratayufush|ratayufush]] || [[word:ratayuf|ratayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ratayethe|ratayethe]] || [[word:ratayeje|ratayeje]] || [[word:ratayeshe|ratayeshe]] || [[word:rataye|rataye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratayothoth|ratayothoth]] || [[word:ratayojoj|ratayojoj]] || [[word:ratayoshosh|ratayoshosh]] || [[word:ratay|ratay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratayotho|ratayotho]] || [[word:ratayojo|ratayojo]] || [[word:ratayosho|ratayosho]] || [[word:ratayo|ratayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratayofoth|ratayofoth]] || [[word:ratayofoj|ratayofoj]] || [[word:ratayofosh|ratayofosh]] || [[word:ratayof|ratayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ratay忙th忙|ratay忙th忙]] || [[word:ratay忙j忙|ratay忙j忙]] || [[word:ratay忙sh忙|ratay忙sh忙]] || [[word:ratay忙|ratay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratayathath|ratayathath]] || [[word:ratayajaj|ratayajaj]] || [[word:ratayashash|ratayashash]] || [[word:ratay|ratay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratayatha|ratayatha]] || [[word:ratayaja|ratayaja]] || [[word:ratayasha|ratayasha]] || [[word:rataya|rataya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratayafath|ratayafath]] || [[word:ratayafaj|ratayafaj]] || [[word:ratayafash|ratayafash]] || [[word:ratayaf|ratayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ratayasha|ratayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goratayasha|goratayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiratayasha|gokiratayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ratayn眉sha|ratayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorataynkn眉sha|gorataynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiratayn眉sha|gokiratayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rataysh毛sha|rataysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorataynksh毛sha|gorataynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirataysh毛sha|gokirataysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ratayrosha|ratayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorataynkrosha|gorataynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiratayrosha|gokiratayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rataymusha|rataymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorataynkmusha|gorataynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirataymusha|gokirataymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rataysherasha|rataysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorataynksherasha|gorataynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirataysherasha|gokirataysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ratayngasha|ratayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorataynkngasha|gorataynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiratayngasha|gokiratayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ratayasha|ratayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorataynkyasha|gorataynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiratayasha|gokiratayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ratayamasha|ratayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorataynkyamasha|gorataynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiratayamasha|gokiratayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ratayn眉sh毛sha|ratayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorataynkn眉sh毛sha|gorataynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiratayn眉sh毛sha|gokiratayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ratayn眉rosha|ratayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorataynkn眉rosha|gorataynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiratayn眉rosha|gokiratayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratayn眉musha|ratayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorataynkn眉musha|gorataynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratayn眉musha|gokiratayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rataysh毛n眉sha|rataysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorataynksh毛n眉sha|gorataynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirataysh毛n眉sha|gokirataysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rataysh毛rosha|rataysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorataynksh毛rosha|gorataynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirataysh毛rosha|gokirataysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rataysh毛musha|rataysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorataynksh毛musha|gorataynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirataysh毛musha|gokirataysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ratayron眉sha|ratayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorataynkron眉sha|gorataynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiratayron眉sha|gokiratayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ratayrosh毛sha|ratayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorataynkrosh毛sha|gorataynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiratayrosh毛sha|gokiratayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratayromusha|ratayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorataynkromusha|gorataynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratayromusha|gokiratayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rataymun眉sha|rataymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorataynkmun眉sha|gorataynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirataymun眉sha|gokirataymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rataymush毛sha|rataymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorataynkmush毛sha|gorataynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirataymush毛sha|gokirataymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rataymurosha|rataymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorataynkmurosha|gorataynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirataymurosha|gokirataymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ratay|ratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙t忙y|r忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horatay|horatay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙t忙y|hor忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoratay|hohoratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙t忙y|hohor忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ratay|n眉ratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙t忙y|n眉r忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ratay|n眉n眉ratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙t忙y|n眉n眉r忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ratay|n茂ratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙t忙y|n茂r忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ratay|n茂n茂ratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙t忙y|n茂n茂r忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luratay|luratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙t忙y|lur忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluratay|luluratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙t忙y|lulur忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liratay|liratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙t忙y|lir忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliratay|liliratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙t忙y|lilir忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koratay|koratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙t忙y|kor忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoratay|kokoratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙t忙y|kokor忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keratay|keratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙t忙y|ker忙t忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeratay|kekeratay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙t忙y|keker忙t忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
